title: The Autobiography of Phra Ajaan Lee
pageTitle: The Autobiography of Phra Ajaan Lee
author: Ajaan Lee Dhammadharo
summary: A fascinating account of Ajaan Lee's life, which he dictated from his hospital bed a year before his death. Highlights include: Ajaan Lee's retelling of a long and elaborate fantasy he had as a young monk that erased, once and for all, any doubts about his choice to live as a monk; several compelling stories of the supranatural, often involving the mysterious appearance and disappearance of Buddha relics; and his poignant explanation of why he always preferred to live in the forest.
